prompt: A wide-angle photorealistic corporate boardroom scene during a high-level business meeting, viewed from the back corner of the room. Around 18 professionals in business attire sit around a large U-shaped light wood conference table, most with open laptops, notebooks, coffee cups, glasses of water, and smartphones in front of them. The group includes men and women of varied ethnicities, all focused toward a huge wall-mounted digital presentation screen on a warm wood-paneled wall. The screen shows a dark blue analytics dashboard with multiple charts and data panels, including bar charts, line graphs, KPI tiles, a world map, percentage circles, and trend visuals, suggesting finance, operations, or executive reporting. A presenter sits near the center-right side facing the screen, while the rest of the team watches attentively in a formal strategy session. The office is a modern executive meeting room with floor-to-ceiling windows along the entire left side, revealing a hazy urban skyline of high-rise buildings in daylight. Include sleek black leather office chairs with chrome frames, a polished wood floor, recessed linear ceiling lights, and a tall green potted plant near the display wall. Natural daylight fills the room, balanced with clean architectural interior lighting. Emphasize realism, professional atmosphere, sharp detail, subtle reflections, believable skin tones, and premium corporate interior design. Shot in a cinematic architectural photography style, ultra-detailed, high resolution, wide composition.
